question: What are the top 5 zip codes of the areas in the United States that have experienced the most hail storm events in the past 10 years? Don't use data from hail reports table.
evidence: ST_WITHIN function returns true if first geospatial object is fully contained by second. Syntax: ST_WITHIN(<geography_expression_1>, <geography_expression_2>). Returns BOOLEAN. Example: SELECT ST_WITHIN(g1, g2) FROM geospatial_table_01;
